description: Hyper-realistic AI UGC studio — generates consistent, photorealistic UGC image and video prompts for social media campaigns

entry_commands.description: Generate a new actor identity card interactively
Build a full 6-layer prompt for a given actor and shot type
Generate anchor frame then call Kling 3.0 via fal.ai for video output
Check a prompt against all hard-enforcement consistency rules

hard_rules_summary: All 10 realism anchors required in every prompt
prompt_seed must be locked per actor across all shots
All 6 prompt layers must be present in order
Video prompts use motion descriptors only — no appearance description
